name: LENNOX INTL INC.  DL-,01
summary: Lennox International Inc. is a global provider of climate control solutions, including heating, ventilation, air conditioning (HVAC), and refrigeration systems. The company operates through three segments: Residential Heating & Cooling, Commercial Heating & Cooling, and Refrigeration. Headquartered in Richardson, Texas, Lennox International serves residential and commercial customers worldwide.
